ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "rohs_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicator of RoHS compliance */,
  "drawing_file" TEXT /* File path to the technical drawing */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the component */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* The price per unit of the component */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* The lead time in days for procurement */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* The minimum order quantity for the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the component */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* The current stock level of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rohs_compliance" (
  "rohs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RoHS compliance record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was certified as RoHS compliant */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* File path to the RoHS compliance certificate */,
  "exemptions" TEXT /* List of exemptions for the component */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the RoHS compliance expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rohs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rohs_compliance_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawings" (
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical drawing */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the drawing */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the drawing was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the drawing (e.g. PDF, DWG, etc.) */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the drawing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being procured */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user procuring the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component being procured */,
  "procurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the procurement event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procurement (e.g. pending, shipped, delivered, etc.) */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the procurement (including shipping) */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the component was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, procurement manager, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the item to their cart */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
